Name: LLM Tool Use
Description: Sends messages to an LLM with tool/function definitions. Returns both content and tool call results. Supports conversation history.

SettingsInputs.Name: Messages
SettingsInputs.Description: JSON array of messages for direct control

SettingsInputs.Name: InputAddress
SettingsInputs.Description: State address to read context data from

SettingsInputs.Name: Destination
SettingsInputs.Description: State address to write completion content to

SettingsInputs.Name: AffinityKey
SettingsInputs.Description: Route to a specific Beacon worker

StateOutputs.Name: Content
StateOutputs.Description: The LLM text response (may be empty if tool calls)

StateOutputs.Name: ToolCalls
StateOutputs.Description: JSON array of tool call objects

StateOutputs.Name: FinishReason
StateOutputs.Description: Why the completion ended (stop, tool_calls, etc.)

StateOutputs.Name: BeaconID
StateOutputs.Description: ID of the Beacon that executed the work
